info.title: Aslan Gaming Gateway Transfer API v1.0
info.description:
This is a page where you can test the transfer API. Since it is linked to real data, please test with caution when creating users and paying money.

 # Example code

  You can use the postman or CURL command  by converting it to any preferable language such as php python nodejs at [https://curlconverter.com/](https://curlconverter.com/) 

 # CORS error

 CORS errors may occur for IPs that do not request "firewall exception" registration. Please connect to the "Server IP" registered as a firewall exception, or test it using the displayed CURL command. After integration and test completion, be sure to "Set IP Allowed for API Calls" If you face any issue please contact us though service desk.



 After integration is completed, be sure to whitelist the IP to call the API in "My Page" > "Set API Call Allowed IP".

 # Required HTTP headers

 All HTTP requests related to the use of the API must include the following HTTP headers.:

| name | value | example |
|-----|-----|-------|
| `Authorization`  |  `Bearer { API KEY}`  | `Authorization: Bearer 792d58d1-a256-4bbe-bf7a-24080615f661`    |

  A header is required 🔐 if there is an  icon on the right .Authorization

 # How to pass authentication information when testing

 When testing on this page, 🔓 you can test by clicking the icon at the bottom right and entering the provided token to use.

 # How to play game for testing 
 Before play game you should want deposit money using deposit API. 

 Also you must be add `game_id` or `lobby_id` as a parameter. you can get that details using game list API and lobby list API. Other parameters are `user_id` and `device` .

 # Result message definition:

 It returns the HTTP Status Code for normal results and 200 the HTTP Status Code for abnormal situations, and displays the parameter where the error occurred and the error as shown in the example below.

| name | value |
|-----|-------|
| `Return Data format`  |  `JSON`  |
| `Return Data structure`  |  `{ data: response data, status: { error: error status, message: response message, timestamp: responce time } }`  | 

 # Korean encoding 

 All data, including all Hangul and special characters, UTF-8 without BOM must be used, especially those who develop on Windows Server, please check this. 

 If an EUR-KR request is made using encoding, it may be blocked due to the inability to use the normal service or the occurrence of periodic errors.

 # Time zone 

 The time zone of this API service uses a dynamic Time Zone that is selected by the parent agent, EX: If the parent agent selects Korean time (Asia/Seoul) it will inherit to child agents. 

 Parent selected timezone cannot be changed by child agents. 

 # API development flow 

 ## Get an API KEY 

 ### Add the API KEY and header information `/my-info` and call to check if your account information is loaded normally 

 `/game-list` Use the vendor, type params to check value. 

 `/lobby-list` Use the vendor, lobby_id params to check value. 

 `/playGame` to get the game launch link. In PHP frameworks currency word is encoding please use `json_decode()` function or if you are using core php directly return to game url 

 If you want to access the game directly `/game-list`, or if you want to access the lobby where the game is listed, get the value `/lobby-list` for access through. 

 When using "Transfer", add the user's money. `/deposit` 

 When using "Seamless", please implement an extensible API. `/changeBalance`

parameters.name: order
parameters.description: Select a search sort Possible values ('asc,'desc')

get.description:
URL : `/playGame` 

  PHP development needs to json_decode the response

parameters.name: game_id or lobby_id
parameters.description: Casino Game ID/ Lobby ID - You can only use one game_id or lobby_id at a time

get.description:
URL : `/history`

 Only can get previous 7 days data. 

 You can use only page or index parameter. Not allowed to use both together.

 Default ordering is desc.

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Number of records per page (up to 1000)

parameters.name: pages
parameters.description: Number of pages.also you can’t use pages with index

parameters.name: index
parameters.description: Index parameter can use without pages parameter. also you can use `id` of history object for index parameter

parameters.name: start
parameters.description: YYYY-MM-DD hh:mm:ss (Based on your agent timezone. Find Your timezone from My Page -> Time Zone)

parameters.name: end
parameters.description: YYYY-MM-DD hh:mm:ss (Based on your agent timezone. Find Your timezone from My Page -> Time Zone)
